title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Jared Sires at Anthropic built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that helps sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice using Claude Code. The tool addresses the administrative burden sales teams face by automating email composition while maintaining voice consistency.
